hero.title: Natural bread and cookies, no preservatives and with real ingredients.
hero.subtitle: In Dallas, finding quality artisanal bread and desserts made with real ingredients is a challenge… until our Güerita arrived.
hero.description: Our cookies, made with sourdough, have a complexity and depth of flavor that makes them unique. Our rustic breads go through a natural fermentation of over 20 hours.

about.metaDescription: Discover the story behind Pásele Güerita and our sourdough in Dallas.
about.heroSubtitle: It all started with a sourdough loaf and the desire to share the true flavor of artisanal bread.

story.p1: It all started in my kitchen, with a bubbly jar called Güerita. What began as an attempt to make healthier desserts and bread for my family — no sugar, no refined flours — turned into Paséle Güerita, our small artisanal bakery.
story.p2: We believe cravings should be delicious and conscious: less sugar, natural fermentation, and real benefits for your body. Every cookie and every loaf is made with care, with high-quality ingredients and lots of love, no artificial colors or flavors.
story.p3: Our sourdough, our Güerita, goes through a slow fermentation that not only intensifies the flavor but also makes our bread and cookies easier to digest. Every batch is small, fresh, and full of love — just like we'd bake for our own family.

realIngredients.title: Real Ingredients
realIngredients.desc: No preservatives, no artificial colors. Just the best that nature gives us.

slowFermentation.title: Slow Fermentation
slowFermentation.desc: Over 20 hours of natural fermentation for deep flavor and easy digestion.

madeWithLove.title: Made with Love
madeWithLove.desc: Every batch is small and personal. We bake as if it were for our own family.

conditions: No sales at the pickup point

policies.metaDescription: Learn our policies on ingredients, pickup, returns, and storage.
policies.heading: Paséle Güerita Policies

section1.title: 1. Ingredients and allergies
section1.p1: Our products are made with natural, high-quality ingredients.
section1.alert: For your safety, review the allergen list — products may include eggs, walnuts, almonds, and wheat.
section1.p2: If you have severe allergies, please let us know before ordering so we can take the necessary precautions.

section2.title: 2. Wait time and pickup
section2.p1: We value your time and our customers'. The wait time at each pick-up point is a maximum of 15 minutes.
section2.p2: If you can't pick up your order in that time, you can do it on the next available delivery by coordinating with us.
section2.quote: "If the order isn't picked up at any of the agreed delivery locations, no refund will be issued due to the perishable nature of the artisanal product."

section3.title: 3. Returns and cancellations
section3.p1: All our products are handmade, customized, and fresh. Therefore, we don't accept returns or exchanges once the order has been made or delivered.
section3.p2: If a force majeure issue comes up with your order, contact us right away so we can find the best solution together.

section4.title: 4. Storage suggestions
section4.p1: To keep your bread and cookies fresh and with their unique texture, we recommend storing them in a cool, dry place away from direct light.
section4.tip: All our products can be frozen in airtight containers to extend their life by weeks while keeping their amazing flavor when thawed.

policies.footerText: Our commitment is to give you the best experience. If you need personalized attention, don't hesitate to write to us.

legal.metaDescription: Texas Cottage Food Law licensing information for Pásele Güerita.
legal.heading: Legal Notice
legal.homeKitchen: "This food is made in a home kitchen and is not inspected by the Department of State Health Services or a local health department."
legal.cottageLawText: All our products are made and sold operating under the Texas Cottage Food Law. This allows us to prepare low-risk foods in our home kitchen in Dallas, TX and sell them directly to our customers.
legal.allergensText: Please note that our kitchen processes ingredients that can be known allergens, including (but not limited to): wheat, dairy, eggs, and various nuts (pecans, almonds, etc.). If you have a severe cross-allergy, we recommend caution. All our packaging includes the labels required by law detailing the ingredients.
legal.salesText: Deliveries are limited to the state of Texas and must be hand-to-hand (Pick-up or local Delivery). Per current legislation, we don't ship by mail across state lines.

recipes.heroSubtitle: Explore creative ways to enjoy our bread and cookies.
